name: worksflow_advance_output_proposal
description: Advance one exact user-reviewed Worksflow output proposal through deterministic operation decisions, Apply, immutable revision creation, and canonical review. Call only after the user confirms the accepted operation IDs and review intent.

proposalId.description: The exact output proposal selected from authoritative platform state.

acceptedOperationIds.description: The complete operation selection explicitly confirmed by the user.

reviewerIds.description: Eligible reviewer identities selected from current project membership.

reviewSummary.description: The user's reason for the exact review decision.

approveReview.description: True only when the current user intentionally records approval now.

soloReviewConfirmed.description: True only after an explicit Solo Owner self-review confirmation.
